SEARCH
Package com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model

Record Class RewardRule

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.model.RewardRule
Record Components:
selector - exact target, group selector, or ANY
moneyMin - minimum money payout
moneyMax - maximum money payout
xpMin - minimum xp payout
xpMax - maximum xp payout
dailyMoneyCap - max money that can be earned from this rule per day, 0 for unlimited
dailyXpCap - max xp that can be earned from this rule per day, 0 for unlimited
public record RewardRule(String selector, long moneyMin, long moneyMax, long xpMin, long xpMax, long dailyMoneyCap, long dailyXpCap) extends Record
Configured reward for a single job action selector.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RewardRule(String selector, long moneyMin, long moneyMax, long xpMin, long xpMax, long dailyMoneyCap, long dailyXpCap)
    Creates a reward rule and normalizes its selector for case-insensitive matching.

  • Constructor Details

    • RewardRule

      public RewardRule(String selector, long moneyMin, long moneyMax, long xpMin, long xpMax, long dailyMoneyCap, long dailyXpCap)
      Creates a reward rule and normalizes its selector for case-insensitive matching.

  • Method Details

    • matchScore

      public int matchScore(JobActionContext action)
      Returns a relative match score for the given action.
      Parameters:
      action - player action
      Returns:
      2 for exact match, 1 for group match, 0 for ANY, -1 for no match

    • normalizeSelector

      public static String normalizeSelector(String raw)
      Normalizes selectors so config and runtime matching are case-insensitive.
      Parameters:
      raw - selector
      Returns:
      normalized selector

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns the value of the selector record component.
      Returns:
